name: axiom-distributed-systems
description: Architecture-level distributed systems design: consistency models and CAP/PACELC per operation, failure models and the eight fallacies, replication and quorums, consensus and coordination, partitioning and sharding, time/clocks/ordering, idempotency and deduplication, sagas and distributed transactions (with the outbox/inbox pattern), delivery and ordering semantics, resilience patterns, backpressure and flow control, fault-injection/linearizability/deterministic-simulation testing, and cost-and-when-not-to-distribute accounting. Frames correctness-under-partition as a load-bearing architectural property, not an effort. Ships a router + 13 specialist sheets, 3 commands (/design-distributed-system, /review-distributed-design, /analyze-failure-modes), and 2 SME-protocol-conformant agents (distributed-design-reviewer, failure-scenario-analyst).
